title: tengine.shadergen.shader_reloaded v1
description: Hot-reload completed; count = shaders recompiled. Producer: registry handle SHADER_RELOADED in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/track_group.rs.

count.description: Number of shaders recompiled in this hot-reload pass.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the reload pass, in milliseconds.

reload_status.description: Outcome of the reload (e.g. 'ok', 'error'). Shares vocabulary with the reload_status field on tengine.shadergen.sync.
